prestazioni: Engine: Koenigsegg 5.0L twin-turbo V8 (internal code 'JESKO 2.0') with forged internals, upgraded to 1,400+ HP via twin Garrett GTX5544R Gen II turbos, custom billet compressor wheels, and 42 psi max boost on E85 fuel. Includes a bespoke titanium 4-2-1 equal-length exhaust manifold with Inconel 625 headers and a secondary catalytic converter delete for optimized scavenging.

Drivetrain: 9-speed Koenigsegg Light Speed Transmission (LST) with a reinforced carbon-fiber torque tube, upgraded AP Racing CP9669-1000 clutch assembly (dual-plate, cerametallic), and a Quaife ATB helical LSD with 45% lockup for aggressive track launches. Custom gear ratios: 1st 3.2:1, 2nd 2.1:1, 3rd 1.6:1, 4th 1.3:1, 5th 1.1:1, 6th-9th overdrive optimized for Le Mans-style endurance racing.

Suspension & Chassis: Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed bleed), custom valving for 1,200 kg downforce at 250 km/h, and spherical bearing top mounts. Full carbon-fiber subframe reinforcement with a titanium bolt-on roll cage (FIA 8862-2018 certified) and a bespoke front splitter with active Gurney flaps (developed in collaboration with Sauber Engineering).
estetica: Body: Full carbon-fiber 'Ghost' weave body panels with a matte clear coat, including a custom 'Jesko Attack' front splitter with integrated dive planes and a rear diffuser with active aerodynamic elements (adjustable via Koenigsegg's 'Aero Control' system). Side skirts feature integrated LED running lights (Osram Ostar Projection LEDs) and carbon-fiber canards for vortex generation.

Wheels & Aero: Dymag Ultra-Lightweight carbon-fiber wheels (20x10.5 front, 21x12.5 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35 R20 front, 325/30 R21 rear) with custom tread compounds for 100°C track temperatures. Rear wing is a fixed-position, dual-element design (carbon-fiber, 1.8m span) with a 15° attack angle and integrated third brake light (Lumileds Luxeon Z ES LEDs).

Interior: Full Alcantara-wrapped cockpit with a bespoke MOMO Prototipo EVO steering wheel (carbon-fiber, 380mm diameter) featuring a 12-button programmable keypad for traction control, launch control, and aero adjustments. Seats are carbon-fiber bucket seats (Sparco Pro ADV) with 6-point Schroth Profi II-6 harnesses and a custom Koenigsegg-branded quick-release system. Dashboard features a 10.25-inch digital display with a bespoke 'Heritage' theme (inspired by the CC8S) and a Motec C187 data logger for real-time telemetry.
